info.title: Explore Form and Field components (@explore subagent)

parts.text:
I need to understand the Form component API in this codebase. Please find and read the following:
1. The Form component exported from `#/forms` — look in `integrations/forms/` directory
2. How other forms in `src/components/forms/` use the Form component (check 1-2 other form files for patterns)

Specifically, I need to know:
- Does the Form component provide `onSubmit`, `isPending`, `isSaveDraftPending`, `onSaveDraft` via render props or context?
- What does the Form component's props interface look like?

Return the Form component source and a summary of how other forms wire up mutations.

The user wants to understand the Form component API in this codebase. Let me start by finding the Form component in the `integrations/forms/` directory, and then look at how other forms in `src/components/forms/` use it.
I'll start by finding the Form component in the integrations directory and examining form files in the components directory.
Let me read the main Form component files and the index, then a couple of the form files that use it.
Now let me read the core Form component files and a couple of example form usages in parallel.

state.output:
<path>/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/integrations/forms/form.tsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod";
2: import { useId } from "react";
3: import type { FieldErrors } from "react-hook-form";
4: import { FormProvider, useForm } from "react-hook-form";
5: import type { z } from "zod";
6: 
7: import { FormContext } from "./context";
8: import { buildDefaults, buildFieldMap } from "./use-form";
9: 
10: export type ValidationMode = "onBlur" | "onChange" | "onSubmit" | "all";
11: 
12: type FormRenderMethods = ReturnType<typeof useForm>;
13: 
14: export type FormProps<T extends z.ZodObject<any>> = {
15:   schema: T;
16:   onSubmit: (values: z.infer<T>) => void;
17:   onInvalid?: (errors: FieldErrors) => void;
18:   defaultValues?: Partial<z.infer<T>>;
19:   validationMode?: ValidationMode;
20:   className?: string;
21:   children: React.ReactNode | ((methods: FormRenderMethods) => React.ReactNode);
22:   ref?: React.Ref<any>;
23: };
24: 
25: export function Form<T extends z.ZodObject<any>>({
26:   schema,
27:   onSubmit,
28:   onInvalid,
29:   defaultValues: defaultValuesProp,
30:   validationMode = "onBlur",
31:   className,
32:   children,
33:   ref,
34: }: FormProps<T>) {
35:   const uid = useId();
36:   const fieldMap = buildFieldMap(schema);
37:   const schemaDefaults = buildDefaults(schema, defaultValuesProp);
38: 
39:   const methods = useForm({
40:     defaultValues: schemaDefaults,
41:     mode: validationMode,
42:     resolver: zodResolver(schema) as any,
43:     reValidateMode: "onChange",
44:   });
45: 
46:   if (ref) {
47:     (ref as React.MutableRefObject<any>).current = methods;
48:   }
49: 
50:   function handleSubmit(e: React.FormEvent) {
51:     e.preventDefault();
52:     methods.handleSubmit((values) => {
53:       const parsed = schema.parse(values);
54:       onSubmit(parsed as z.infer<T>);
55:     }, onInvalid as any)();
56:   }
57: 
58:   return (
59:     <FormContext value={{ fieldMap, formId: uid }}>
60:       <FormProvider {...methods}>
61:         <form className={className} onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
62:           {typeof children === "function" ? children(methods) : children}
63:         </form>
64:       </FormProvider>
65:     </FormContext>
66:   );
67: }

(End of file - total 67 lines)
</content>

state.title: integrations/forms/context.ts

state.output:
<path>/home/aditya/projects/alpauls-ats/integrations/forms/use-form.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import type { z } from "zod";
2: 
3: export type FieldMeta = {
4:   label?: string;
5:   placeholder?: string;
6:   description?: string;
7:   component?: "textarea" | "password" | "combobox" | "checkbox";
8: };
9: 
10: export type FieldKind =
11:   | "string"
12:   | "number"
13:   | "boolean"
14:   | "enum"
15:   | "array"
16:   | "optional"
17:   | "unknown";
18: 
19: export type FieldDef = {
20:   kind: FieldKind;
21:   meta: FieldMeta | undefined;
22:   isOptional: boolean;
23:   enumEntries?: Record<string, string>;
24:   arrayElement?: FieldMap;
25:   innerKind?: FieldKind;
26:   innerMeta?: FieldMeta | undefined;
27:   checks?: string[];
28: };
29: 
30: export type FieldMap = Record<string, FieldDef>;
31: 
32: export function getKind(schema: any): FieldKind {
33:   const type: string = schema._zod?.def?.type ?? "";
34:   if (type === "string") return "string";
35:   if (type === "number") return "number";
36:   if (type === "boolean") return "boolean";
37:   if (type === "enum") return "enum";
38:   if (type === "array") return "array";
39:   if (type === "optional") return "optional";
40:   return "unknown";
41: }
42: 
43: export function getMeta(schema: any): FieldMeta | undefined {
44:   if (typeof schema.meta === "function") {
45:     const result = schema.meta();
46:     if (result && typeof result === "object") return result;
47:   }
48:   return undefined;
49: }
50: 
51: export function getChecks(schema: any): string[] {
52:   const def = schema._zod?.def;
53:   if (!def?.checks) return [];
54:   return def.checks
55:     .map((c: any) => c.format ?? c._zod?.def?.type ?? c.type)
56:     .filter(Boolean);
57: }
58: 
59: export function buildFieldDef(schema: any): FieldDef {
60:   const kind = getKind(schema);
61:   const meta = getMeta(schema);
62: 
63:   if (kind === "optional") {
64:     const innerSchema = schema._zod?.def?.innerType;
65:     const innerKind = innerSchema ? getKind(innerSchema) : "unknown";
66:     const innerMeta = innerSchema ? getMeta(innerSchema) : undefined;
67:     const checks = innerSchema ? getChecks(innerSchema) : [];
68:     return {
69:       checks,
70:       innerKind,
71:       innerMeta,
72:       isOptional: true,
73:       kind,
74:       meta: meta ?? innerMeta,
75:       ...(innerKind === "enum" && innerSchema
76:         ? { enumEntries: innerSchema._zod?.def?.entries }
77:         : {}),
78:       ...(innerKind === "array" && innerSchema
79:         ? { arrayElement: buildFieldMap(innerSchema._zod?.def?.element) }
80:         : {}),
81:     };
82:   }
83: 
84:   if (kind === "array") {
85:     const elementSchema = schema._zod?.def?.element;
86:     return {
87:       arrayElement: elementSchema ? buildFieldMap(elementSchema) : undefined,
88:       isOptional: false,
89:       kind,
90:       meta,
91:     };
92:   }
93: 
94:   return {
95:     checks: getChecks(schema),
96:     isOptional: false,
97:     kind,
98:     meta,
99:     ...(kind === "enum" ? { enumEntries: schema._zod?.def?.entries } : {}),
100:   };
101: }
102: 
103: export function buildFieldMap(schema: any): FieldMap {
104:   if (!schema?.shape) return {};
105:   const map: FieldMap = {};
106:   for (const [key, fieldSchema] of Object.entries(schema.shape)) {
107:     map[key] = buildFieldDef(fieldSchema);
108:   }
109:   return map;
110: }
111: 
112: export function deriveDefault(fieldDef: FieldDef): any {
113:   if (fieldDef.isOptional) return undefined;
114:   if (fieldDef.kind === "string") return "";
115:   if (fieldDef.kind === "number") return 0;
116:   if (fieldDef.kind === "boolean") return false;
117:   if (fieldDef.kind === "enum" && fieldDef.enumEntries) {
118:     return Object.values(fieldDef.enumEntries)[0];
119:   }
120:   if (fieldDef.kind === "array") return [];
121:   return undefined;
122: }
123: 
124: export function buildDefaults(
125:   schema: z.ZodObject<any>,
126:   overrides?: Record<string, any>,
127: ): Record<string, any> {
128:   const fieldMap = buildFieldMap(schema);
129:   const defaults: Record<string, any> = {};
130:   for (const [key, def] of Object.entries(fieldMap)) {
131:     defaults[key] = deriveDefault(def);
132:   }
133:   if (overrides) {
134:     for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(overrides)) {
135:       defaults[key] = value;
136:     }
137:   }
138:   return defaults;
139: }

(End of file - total 139 lines)
</content>
